slices.lastFinding: Gitar PR #59: resolveBundleFile called registry.resolveBundle redundantly after the outer renderBootstrapPrompt had already gated on status === 'loaded'; opened a race window where the two calls could disagree. Folded inline in commit 53377e6.

Gitar PR #60: register() after stop() could leak a chokidar instance. Folded inline in commit dba1d4f via a `stopping` flag guard at register() entry; +1 regression test 'register after stop is a no-op'.

Gitar PR #61: quarantine() deleted the source file even when copyFileSync failed; payload + recovery surface both lost. Folded inline in commit 72fe972 by restructuring quarantine to write .error.json first, then copy+rm in a guarded try (mirrors inbox/worker.ts:92-101 exactly). +0 regression tests — portably simulating copyFileSync failure requires fs mocking the test suite doesn't currently use; same justification as slice 2's chokidar smoke-only tests.

notes.previousChain: phase-20-bootstrap-ingest closed via PR #56 (tracking issue #52 closed 2026-05-27); the prior .claude-code/auto-continue-state.json was overwritten at Phase 21 chain-open.
notes.labelGap: throughline:pause label still absent in repo at Phase 21 chain-open (fourth consecutive chain boundary without it). Spec-author confirmed at chain-open: create the label manually out-of-band; chain operates on the two fallback signals (marker file + /pause comment).
notes.slice2WatcherCleanup: Locked at chain-open and documented in watcher.ts module header + register() comment: accept the watcher-leak for the 'user renders prompt then never runs Claude Code' abandonment case. Chokidar depth: 0 on a single directory is near-free; backend restart self-clears the registry; render is a rare action — over-engineering self-clearing cleanup is the wrong cost trade.
notes.slice3ProjectsServiceRefactor: Slice 2's bootstrapWatcher?: BootstrapWatcherRegistry direct parameter on createProjectsService was replaced in slice 3 with an onBootstrapUnregister?: (projectId: string) => void callback. The construction cycle (watcher needs worker, worker needs import service, import service needs projects) couldn't be resolved with a direct-reference param; the callback closes over a let-bound watcher reference populated after construction. Implementation-shape refinement within slice 2's API surface; no T-D or C-D21 change (the contract 'unregister on project delete' is preserved).
notes.slice4RegressionRisk: Slice 4 replaces working components (ThroughlineStatusBlock + BootstrapReviewBlock) with a unified block, not greenfield UI. Slice 4's BootstrapBlock.test.tsx must explicitly cover retained behaviour from the old blocks (status banner across .throughline/ states; review-queue link still navigates correctly; stale-row count still displayed) — surfaced for slice 4's PR review.
notes.slice4ChainClose: Slice 4 is the chain's final slice; its handover closes the chain with the standard four-slice summary table (PR / merged / fix-rounds / lines) per the AUTO_CONTINUE_WORKFLOW chain-close convention. Slice 4 should also overwrite .claude-code/auto-continue-state.json with chainClosedAt populated.
